lines.text: Monica and Rachel's, it's 0-Dark:30, in other words it's really, really early. Everyone's asleep, and all through the apartments not a creature was stirring, not even a mouse. That is except for the chick, who turns out to be a rooster and is crowing in the sun. Needless to say, this awakens Monica and Rachel who rush into their living room, searching for the cause of the sound.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What the hell is that?!! (to Monica) What the hell is that? Is that you? (Monica nods her head no, and Rachel realizes what is making that sound.) Ohhhhhhh! (storms over to Chandler and Joey's with Monica in trail.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Boy, you are really not a morning person.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (angrily) BACK OFF!!! (She starts banging on their door.) Get up! Get up! Get up! God damn it! Get up, get up, get up, get up, get up!!
Chandler opens the door, finally.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What is that noise?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's the chick! She's...going through some changes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What kind of changes?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well the vet seems to think that's she's becoming a rooster. (The rooster crows.) We're getting a second opinion.
Opening Credits
Monica and Rachel's, it's later that morning, everybody has gotten up and Ross and Phoebe has joined them for breakfast. Rachel is returning from shopping.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, what are you doing shopping at eight in the morning?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I've been up since six. Thanks to somebody's dumb-ass rooster.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys you really should get rid of those animals. They shouldn't be living in an apartment.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Especially not with all of these knives and cookbooks around...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. I'm gonna go to the fertility doctor and um, see if I'm ready to have Frank and Alice's embryo transferred into my uterus.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Now, how will they know if you're ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, they're just gonna umm, look to see if my endometria layer is thick.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I can uh, check that for ya.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay everyone, think thick.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Good-bye! Good luck! (She opens the door to reveal Monica and Joey.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi! Wish me luck!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, good luck.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Good luck. (to Monica) And I'm still right!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That is sooo not true!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: She's mad because I know today's her laundry day and that means she's wearing her old lady underpants.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can check that for ya.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I just-I can't believe that you think that you and Chandler know me and Rachel better than we know you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well... we-we do. You can only eat Tic Tacks in even numbers.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, what's that about?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Rachel) And you... Ross, I believe, if you check Rachel's bag you will find a half-eaten box of cookies in there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (He does so, and finds a half-eaten box of cookies.) You're good. (Tries a cookie.) These are not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm so not impressed. Everybody snacks when they shop.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah? Ross, how many items left in that bag?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Five.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, ten bucks says that we can name every item in that bag.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How many guesses do you get?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Six.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Challenge extended.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Deal!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Challenge excepted.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, we'll start with...apples.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We'll be starting with apples.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Ross) Stop that now!
Ross reveals a bag of apples.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Uhh, tortilla chips, yogurt.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Diet soda.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. Yes. Yes. (They're perfect so far.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Orange juice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! There's no orange juice in there! We win!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ha-ha!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: They have another guess.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, well, we won that one.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, the last thing...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh-oh, oh, oh-oh! (Whispers something in Joey's ear.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no, not for like another two weeks.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I got it! Scotch... tape. (They're right.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How did you know she would buy scotch tape?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, we used there's up last night making scary faces.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Aww, man!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right! Ten buck! Fork it over! Cough it up! Pay the piper! Gimme it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That does not mean you know us better, I-I want a rematch.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, and none of these stupid grocery questions, real personal questions.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! And the winner gets a hundred bucks.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Serious?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you scared?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! All right, who-who makes up the questions?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross will do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh sure, "Ross will do it!" It's not like he has a job, or a child, or a life of his own.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fine! We'll ask Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no-no, I-I wanna play.
The Doctor's office, Dr. Zane is examining Phoebe as Frank and Alice watch.

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: It looks like your uterus is ready for implantation.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! I knew it! I knew it! I felt really thick this morning.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well, okay, so what's now-go get, go get the eggs, put 'em in there.

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: Okay, it'll take just a little while to prepare the embryos.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Embryossss? As in, "More than one?"

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: Um-hmm, five actually.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Five? Okay, where am I giving birth, a hospital or a big box under the stairs?

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: We do five because that gives you a 25% chance that at least one will attach.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's it! 25 percent? That means that's it's like 75 percent chance of no baby at all!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Hey, y'know I was thinking, what are the odds like if-if, if you stuff like 200 of them in there?

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Sweety, now, she's a woman, not a gumball machine.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, well y'know what, don't worry you guys, 'cause I'm-I'm gonna do this as many times as it takes to get it right.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well, you see, the-the thing is, we-we only got, we kinda have one shot to make it right.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Umm, it costs $16,000 each time you do this. So, umm, we're kinda using all the money we have to do it just this one time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Whoa!! That-okay, that's a lot of pressure on me and my uterus. (to Dr. Zane) So, well okay, so is there-is maybe is there something that I can do y'know just to like help make sure I get pregnant?

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: No, I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow! You guys really don't know anything!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: I know! Why don't you get drunk! That worked for a lot of girls in my high school.
Monica and Rachel's, the game is about to begin.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You guys! Do you realize that any minute now, Phoebe can be pregnant?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know! I know, it's such a huge, life-altering thing.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know.
They all pause and think about it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The test is ready.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Yeah! Yes! (They all right into the living room, all excited.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, each team will answer ten questions. The first team that answers the most questions wins. Okay, the categories are, Fears and Pet Peeves, Ancient History, Literature, and It's All Relative. Now, the coin toss to see who goes first. (He flips the coin and they all watch it hit the table and stop. Then they all look up at him, to see who goes first.) Okay, somebody call it this time.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh yeah!
Ross flips the coin again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Tails!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's heads. (The guys celebrate.) Gentlemen, pick your category.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fears and Pet Peeves.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What is Monica's biggest pet peeve?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Animals dressed as humans.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's correct. Ladies?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Same category?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: According to Chandler, what phenomenon scares the bejeezus out of him?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Michael Flatley, Lord of the Dance!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That is correct.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Chandler) The Irish gig guy?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: His legs flail about as if independent of his body!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Gentlemen, you're pick.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's All Relative.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica and I have a grandmother who died, you both went to her funeral, name that grandmother!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Chandler) Nana?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She has a real name.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (answering the question) Althea!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Althea?! What are you doing?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I took a shot.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're shooting with Althea?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Althea is correct.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nice shooting!
Ross motions for the girls to pick.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We'll take Literature!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Every week, the TV Guide comes to Chandler and Joey's apartment. What name appears on the address label?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Chandler gets it! It's Chandler Bing!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm afraid the TV Guide comes to Chinandolor Bong.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I knew that! Rachel! Use you're head!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, it's Miss Chinandolor Bong.
The Doctor's office, Phoebe is giving a pep talk to the petrie dish containing the embryos.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hello, tiny embryos. Well, I'm-I'm Phoebe Buffay, hi! I'm-I'm-I'm hoping to be your uterus for the next nine months. You should know, that we're doing this for Frank and Alice, who you know, you've been there! Umm, y'know they want you so much, so when you guys get in there, really grab on. Okay, and-and I promise that I'll keep you safe and warm until you're ready to have them take you home, so... Oh! And also, umm next time you see me, I'm screaming, don't worry, that's what's supposed to happen.

lines.speaker: Dr. Zane
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh. (To the embryos) Good luck.
Monica and Rachel's, the game is coming to a close.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, the score is nine to eight in favor of the guys. Ladies if you miss this the game is theirs, pick your category.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shouting) It's All Relative!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You don't have to shout everything.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shouting) I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ooh. What is the name of Chandler's father's Las Vegas all-male burlesque?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Viva Las Gaygas!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Unfortunately that is correct.

lines.speaker: The Girls
lines.text: Yes!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, we have a tie. Luckily, I have prepared for such an event. (He opens up an envelope and holds up some note cards.) The Lightning Round!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Ohhhh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thirty seconds, all the questions you can answer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You guys are dead, I am so good at lighting rounds.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I majored in lightning rounds. All right, we're gonna destroy you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Huh, wanna bet?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I'm so confused as to what we've been doing so far...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How about we play for more money, say 150?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 150 dollars.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Say 200?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 200 dollars.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're doing it again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, I don't want to lose 200 dollars.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We won't. (to Chandler) 300?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm just trying to spice it up!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, so let's play for some pepper! Stop spending my money!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got it! How about, if we win, they have to get rid of the rooster?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oooohh that's interesting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, no way, that rooster's family!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Throw in the duck too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What do you have against the duck?! He doesn't make any noise!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, he gets the other one all riled up.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, we are not gonna...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (interrupting) All right, hold on! If you win, we give up the birds.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shocked) Dah!! (Chandler motions for him to calm down.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But if we win, we get your apartment.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oooooh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Deal!
Commercial Break
Monica and Rachel's, continued from earlier, only slightly later.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, betting the apartment, I don't know about this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, I have not missed one question the whole game. I own this game! Look at my hand. (Holds up her hand.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why? Do you have the answers written on there?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! Steady as a rock! Now, are you with me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, let's do it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (They go into the living room.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, gentlemen, you're up first.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Starts jumping around.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You have 30 seconds. And the lightning round begins-stop it (Chandler stops jumping)-now. What was Monica's nickname when she was a field hockey goalie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Big fat goalie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. Rachel claims this is her favorite movie...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dangerous Liaisons.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. Her actual favorite movie is...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Weekend at Bernie's.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. In what part of her body did Monica get a pencil stuck at age 14?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh! (Whispers something in Joey's ear and then in Ross's ear.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eww! No!! Her ear! All right, Monica categorizes her towels. How many categories are there?
They both confer.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Everyday use.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fancy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Guest.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fancy guest.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Two seconds...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh, 11!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 11, unbelievable 11 is correct. (The guys celebrate.) All right, that's 4 for the guys. Ladies, you're up.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on!
As they change places, they give each other the now patented Ross maneuver. If you don't know what that means, click here to find out The One With Joey's New Girlfriend.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 30 seconds on the clock. 5 questions wins the game. The lightning round begins...now! What is Joey's favorite food?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sandwiches!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. Chandler was how old when he first touched a girl's breast?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks man.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, had an imaginary childhood friend. His name was?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maurice.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct, his profession was?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Space cowboy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct! What is Chandler Bing's job?
The girls are stumped

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh gosh, it has something to do with numbers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And processing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He carries a briefcase.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 10 seconds, you need this or you lose the game.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's umm, it has something to do with transponding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-oh-oh, he's a transponce-transpondster!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not even a word! I can get this! I can get this!
Ross stops the clock, signifying the end of the lightning round.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: NOOOOOOOOO!!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Chandler and Joey
lines.text: YEAH!!! YES!!!
Monica and Rachel's, erm, Chandler and Joey's, Chandler and Joey are carrying in the foosball table.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I call Monica's room!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can't just call Monica's room.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure I can, standard shotgun rules, I'm sight of the room and I called it.
Chandler grunts and turns around, sees that he's in sight of the room, and mouths damn!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Man, I feel like I'm coming down with something.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. (to Chandler) I bet you can't guess what color my tonsils are? I'll bet the apartment!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I would never bet this apartment. It's too nice.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-ooh Pheebs, are they in there?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, yeah, uh-huh, they're implanted.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How do you feel?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, freaked. 'Cause it turns out that the odds are really sucky. And! This is Frank and Alice's like only shot. Like, they are literally putting all of their eggs in my basket.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, but I bet it works.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?! How much?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, I'm gonna go take a pregnancy test, right now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow! You can tell this soon.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well the doctor says it takes a couple days, but my body's always been a little faster than Western medicine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering from Chandler's bedroom, I guess, and sees the foosball table.) Oh my God! I can't believe you guys are actually think you're moving in here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well believe it baby!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well I-I-I'm not moving.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, it was a stupid bet! We were just playing a game!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You can't just ignore the bet! It's a bet! You bet and you bet and if you lose, you lose the bet!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look Rach, we have to move. I mean if they had lost, we would've made them get rid of the birds. Right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Noooo.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, look, I hate this as much as you, but if it makes you feel better, it's all your fault.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chinadolor Bong, come on, we steal that TV Guide every week!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I knew it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't care, I'm not going anywhere.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Cool, girl roommate.
Phoebe comes in from the bathroom as Rachel sits down in disgust.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nope, not knocked up yet.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's only been a couple of hours, so just give it some time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, all right. Meanwhile, I'm gonna do whatever I can to help this so, I'm just gonna y'know, lie it your chair, (She climbs into the chair and drapes her feet over the back of the chair.) Y'know? Yeah, good, I'm let gravity y'know, do its jobs.
[Cut too later, the moving process is progressing steadily. Monica is trying to lift a heavy box, as Rachel comes in from Chandler's bedroom.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, Rach, can you give me a hand with this box?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Put that box down! We are not going anywhere! This is my apartment and I like it! This is a girl's apartment! That is a boy's apartment, it's dirty and it smells. This is pretty. It's-it's so pretty! And look, and it's-it's purple! And I'm telling you, you with the steady hand, I am not moving, and now I have got the steady hand. (She holds out her hand, which is shaking uncontrollably.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'll take care of it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's right! You do what the hand says!
[Cut to later, Phoebe is still in the chair and Rachel is laying down as Monica enters.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How did it go?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I lost our mattresses.
[Cut to still later, Rachel has now resigned herself to move and is now helping Monica. Phoebe is still on the chair.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (singing) "Are you in there little fetus?
In nine will you come great us?
I will buy you some Adidas."
There's a knock on the door and Monica answers it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Frank and Alice
lines.text: (entering) Hi!

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Hi, Phoebe! We were just at the drugstore and we got you a little present.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh. Oh.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Umm, it's a lollipop and a uh, a home pregnancy test.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, don't mix those up, you could really ruin that lollipop.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: So umm, you feel like taking a test? There's only one question.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, I will. No, I will. But umm, y'know just remember that it's still really early, okay so, if it says that I'm not pregnant, that doesn't mean that I'm not gonna get pregnant, okay and, and just please, just so I don't go completely nuts, just try not put all your hopes on this.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Okay. (They both squeal in expectation.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Great. (Goes to take the test.)
The door opens and Joey and Chandler ride in on the big, fake dog in triumph

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know what, you are mean boys, who are just being mean!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, don't get mad at us! No one forced you to raise the stakes!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is not true. She did! She forced me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, we would still be living here if hadn't gotten the question wrong!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well it stupid, unfair question!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Don't blame the questions!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Would you all stop yelling in our apartment! You are ruining moving day for us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Will you stop calling it your apartment!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But it is our apartment!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No it's not!
They all decay into massive bickering as Phoebe returns from the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys! You guys! You're gonna have a baby! They're gonna have a baby!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: MY SISTER'S GONNA HAVE MY BABY!!!!!!!
They all go over and hug Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, but this can't be good for the baby.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh! (They stop hugging her to let her out and resume the hug without her.)
Closing Credits
Chandler and Joey's, erm, Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Rachel are busy unpacking.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't find garbage bags!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I think I saw some in here.
She opens a door and they both scream at horror at what's inside of it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is it?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know! But maybe if we keep that drawer shut, it'll die.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe we're living here!
Monica and Rachel's, erm, Chandler and Joey's, they're both unpacked. The big ceramic dog has found a new home in front of the window. Joey screams and runs into the living room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?! What-what is it?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Did you see the size of the closets?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe we live here!
They both sit down on the chairs and put up the foot rest.

lines.speaker: Chandler and Joey
lines.text: Awwwww!! (They lean back all the way.) Awwwwwww!!!
End
